changelog: Fixed: Exercise database misinformation — pendulum squat and similar exercises now show correct equipment/category data (Equipment map fixed for 10+ IDs, category now uses exercise_type instead of body_part_id).
Fixed: Workout days no longer disappear — added beforeunload handler that saves a checkpoint on close/refresh. All localStorage writes wrapped in try/catch to prevent silent data loss.
New: Quick Add for missing exercises — type any name in the exercise picker to add a name-only exercise on the fly. No more need to close the workout to add custom movements.

New: Redesigned workout share sheet — Snapchat-style bottom sheet with scrollable content, drag handle, 5 themes (Classic Dark, Dark Crimson, Midnight Blue, Royal Purple, Emerald), and pinned Save/Share buttons.
